title: filix-mas lanceolata
intro: Filix-mas lanceolata, also known as the lady fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the fern family (Dryopteridaceae). The medicinal properties of lady fern include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of lady fern include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support overall well-being. Lady fern can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote healing and relaxation.
